title: Understand: the solar system
description: Check your understanding of the solar system in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.
topic_path: Middle school Earth and space science - NGSS

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement best describes how our solar system was formed?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

choices.content: A cloud of gas and dust was pulled together by gravity, forming a star, planets, and moons.
An asteroid collided with a star, causing the asteroid to break apart into planets and moons.
A dying star exploded, leaving behind a smaller star as well as many planets and moons.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement best describes how our solar system was formed?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

choices.content: A nebula was compressed by gravity, creating planets, moons, and a star.
A star collided with a comet, causing the comet to shatter into planets and moons.
A black hole erupted, releasing a star along with many planets and moons.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement best describes how our solar system was formed?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

choices.content: An interstellar cloud was drawn together by gravity, forming planets, moons, and a star.
A star collided with an asteroid, causing the asteroid to break up into planets and moons.
Two stars merged, creating a new star as well as many planets and moons.

assessment_items.question_content:
The following list describes a certain set of objects in our solar system.

- solid, rocky surfaces
- thin atmospheres
- few or no moons
- no rings

**Which is the most likely set of objects described by this list?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

The following list describes a certain set of objects in our solar system.

- no solid surfaces
- thick atmospheres
- many rings
- many moons

**Which is the most likely set of objects described by this list?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

The following list describes a certain set of objects in our solar system.

- large in size
- no solid surfaces
- many rings and moons
- cold temperatures

**Which is the most likely set of objects described by this list?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

**Which list identifies all four planets located inside the asteroid belt?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

**Which list identifies all four inner planets?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

**Which list identifies all four outer planets?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

**Choose the best option for the blank.**

$\_\_\_\_\_\_$ have a rocky composition and generally orbit the sun between Mars and Jupiter.

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

**Choose the best option for the blank.**

$\_\_\_\_\_\_$ have a dusty, icy composition and generally orbit the sun far beyond Neptune.

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

**Choose the best option for the blank.**

$\_\_\_\_\_\_$ orbit the sun and are much smaller than planets.

[[Ōśā radio 1]]
